name: Galaxy F07
narrative: The Galaxy F07 is a budget big-battery basic: an octa-core processor, 50MP main camera, 6.7-inch HD+ PLS LCD display, and a 5000mAh battery in a light 184g body. Camera hardware is simple with a 50MP + 2MP rear setup, 8MP front camera, and video up to 1080p at 30fps, while charging speed is not specified in the provided specs. It suits value-focused users who want an affordable daily driver for calling, messaging, streaming, and routine photography.
